sections.paragraph: [Apharsachites], Ezr 5:6, and אֲפַרְסַתְכיֵא, [Apharsathchites], Ezr 4:9, Ch. pl. pr.n. of two Assyrian nations, otherwise unknown, unless indeed they be taken as the same. Some have suitably enough compared the Parœtaceni, dwelling between Persia and Media, as to whom see Herod.i.101.
